# pfsense_wake_on_lan (Resource)

Manages a Wake-on-LAN entry on pfSense. Wake-on-LAN allows sending magic packets to wake devices on the network.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pfsense_wake_on_lan" "server" {
  interface   = "lan"
  mac         = "00:11:22:33:44:55"
  description = "File server"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `interface` (String) Network interface for the Wake-on-LAN entry (e.g. 'lan', 'opt1').
- `mac` (String) MAC address of the device to wake.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the Wake-on-LAN entry.

## Import

Import is supported using the MAC address as the ID.

```shell
terraform import pfsense_wake_on_lan.server 00:11:22:33:44:55
```
